name: Fresh Peach Sorbet
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sauternes or other sweet white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped peaches and sugar in a food processor.
2. Add the Sauternes or sweet white wine, and process until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the freezer can of an ice-cream freezer.
4. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
Yield: 5 cups (serving size: 1/2 cup).
